narrative:
Mount Victory / Ridgeway / Hale (precinct in Hardin County) has 923 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.4 percentage points.
